title: Tangy Ethiopian Tofu Wrap
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make wrap filled with crispy tofu, tangy spices, and served with flatbread.
instructions: 1. Preheat a pan over medium heat.
2. Cut the tofu into small cubes and cook until crispy.
3. Add the Ethiopian Spice Blend and cook for 1 minute.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the Tangy Tahini Sauce, lemon juice, and chopped cilantro.
5. Warm the flatbread by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble the wraps by placing the crispy tofu mixture on the flatbread and drizzling with the tahini sauce.
7. Garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
